description_long: This is a tall, tapered tube of lotion with a soft pinkish-beige body and a matte finish. The front features printed text in white and brown, including the brand 'Natura' and the product line 'Tododia', along with product details in Portuguese. The tube is capped with a wide, flat, silver-gray screw-on cap at the base, which provides stability for standing upright. The back of the tube is plain, with no visible graphics or text. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with a smooth, seamless surface and gentle curves.
description: A tall, tapered pink-beige lotion tube with a silver-gray screw-on cap and minimalist printed branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the printed brand, product name, and details on the pink-beige tube with a silver-gray cap.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the sharp taper of the tube and the circular cap, with no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unmarked back of the tube and the full width of the cap.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the tube's taper and the cap, with a hint of the front text visible at the edge.
